title: camellia japonica var. hortensis
intro: Camellia japonica var. hortensis, also known as the Camellia sasanqua, is a type of evergreen shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and glossy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its rich content of flavonoids and saponins, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Camellia sasanqua include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Camellia sasanqua is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, or it can be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and capsules.
